rows.description: Soluta Varia
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash description 'Soluta Varia' as it matches the image. gpt-5-mini incorrectly transcribed 'Voria'. Visual verification confirms 'Varia'.
Added this row. gpt-5-mini entirely missed this column header row, which is clearly visible in the image. Matches gemini-flash.

rows.description: Nov: 24. 1756. Pd Subscription to Loop paper By Compouners & library

rows.description: - 30. Pd a Bill of Arthur Floyd, College Work

rows.english_description_with_amount: Paid a bill to Arthur Floyd for college work, amounting to 15s 8½d.

rows.description: Decr 15. allowd Mr. Sedlen Progref Money

rows.english_description_with_amount: Allowed Mr. Sedlen progress money (travel reimbursement for rector's estate inspection tour), amounting to 6s 0d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Paid Payaters' bill (plasterer or similar tradesman), amounting to 18s 0d.

rows.description: April. Pd Mr. Webber Burser in Cash & article of Notes in yr Burser's Books to supply Deficiency of Money
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms '88' pounds (gpt-5-mini read '68'). gemini-flash's approach of combining the two-line description into a single logical entry is correct, whereas gpt-5-mini incorrectly split it into two separate rows (one with no amount).

rows.english_description_with_amount: Paid Mr. Webber (Bursar) in cash and by notes recorded in the Bursar's books to cover deficiency of money, amounting to £88 15s 7½d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms '3' pence (gpt-5-mini read '5'). Description should be empty for a numeric total row as per output format requirements. Both extractors identified the correct pounds, shillings, and half-penny fraction.
Amounts by consensus. Description should be empty for a numeric total row. Both extractors correctly identified all numeric values including the quarter-penny fraction.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms '¾' fraction (0.75); gpt-5-mini incorrectly read '¼' (0.25). Description should be empty for a numeric total row. Both extractors agreed on pounds, shillings, and whole pence.

rows.description: Summa Solutorum
rows.notes: Added this row. Both extractors incorrectly combined the 'Summa Solutorum' label with the final numeric total. The label is a distinct semantic row on its own line in the image, without an associated amount.

Added this row. Both extractors incorrectly combined this final numeric total with the 'Summa Solutorum' label. The amounts are visually confirmed from the image, and both extractors agreed on these values when they were combined.
